examples: Study on relationships between endochitinase exochitinase and resistance to aspergillus flavus during seeds development of arachis hypogaea l.
These are all important physiological factors to measure the adaptability of Arachis duranensis to low temperature.
For screening high effective oil degrading microorganisms arachis hypogaea has been adopted as carbon source and a dominant bacteria is selected by determining OD value.
There may be problems recognising well known ingredients - for instance, peanut oil goes by the name of Arachis hypogaea on cosmetic labels.
